subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-25 in London
subcodes.first_line: This is a different matter altogether.  Indeed, reward and punishment constitute the basis of order in this world
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینمسئلهٴ دیگر است و مجازات و مکافات سبب نظام عالم مثلاً اگر کسی اینجا بیاید
subcodes.subjects: @murder; causing physical harm, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @reward and punishment
